landing.documentTitle: Ayarla — Set your appointments. Online booking & customer management.
landing.heroEyebrow: From salon to dietitian, one panel
landing.heroTitle: Set your appointments, focus on your craft
landing.heroSubtitle: Online booking, WhatsApp reminders, and customer tracking — designed for beauty, health, and consulting businesses.
landing.trustedTitle: Trusted by businesses across the country
landing.nicheSubtitle: Ready templates and flows for hair salons, beauty centers, nail studios, tattoo artists, therapists, and dietitians.

hair.title: Hair & Barber
hair.desc: Cuts, color, treatments. Staff-based availability and a shareable booking link.

beauty.title: Beauty Center
beauty.desc: Facials, waxing, makeup. Package sessions and buffer to avoid overlapping slots.

nail.title: Nail Studio
nail.desc: Manicure, pedicure, nail extensions. Easy service duration and pricing setup.

tattoo.title: Tattoo & Piercing
tattoo.desc: Session planning, deposit tracking. Client portfolio and approval flow.

psych.title: Therapy & Counseling
psych.desc: Session lengths, recurring visits. Privacy-focused, simple client flow.

diet.title: Nutrition & Dietitian
diet.desc: Initial consults and follow-ups. Package and session tracking for regular care.

landing.featuresSubtitle: Manage appointments, customers, and team from one panel.

booking.title: 24/7 Online Booking
booking.desc: Clients can book anytime. Your calendar fills while you sleep.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Reminders
whatsapp.desc: Automatic reminders and confirmations. Reduce no-shows by up to 40%.

customers.title: Customer Management
customers.desc: Client history, notes, and preferences. Know every customer.

calendar.title: Smart Calendar
calendar.desc: Staff-based availability, leave tracking, and conflict prevention.

packages.title: Packages & Sessions
packages.desc: Sell session packages, track usage. Build loyal customers.

reports.title: Reports
reports.desc: Appointment, revenue, and no-show statistics. Make data-driven decisions.

landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Start accepting online bookings in minutes.
landing.step1Body: Set duration, pricing, and staff availability. Start faster with industry templates.
landing.step2Body: Add one link to your site, Instagram, or WhatsApp for 24/7 booking.
landing.step3Body: WhatsApp reminders keep clients engaged and reduce no-shows.

t1.quote: Thanks to Ayarla, our no-show rate dropped by half. WhatsApp reminders really work.
t1.name: Elif K.

t2.quote: Now I can focus on my work instead of answering booking calls. Clients love the link.
t2.name: Ahmet Y.

t3.quote: Tracking session packages is so easy. My clients can see their remaining sessions.
t3.name: Zeynep D.

landing.ctaBannerSubtitle: Try free for 14 days. No credit card required.

q0.a: You can use core features during the trial. Before it ends we’ll outline paid plans; your data stays with you.

q1.a: You get a dedicated booking page and URL. Clients pick service, staff, and an available time slot.

q2.a: No, but WhatsApp reminders and confirmations typically reduce no-shows significantly.

q3.a: Business and customer data is protected with modern security practices. You provide required privacy notices under your local law.

q4.a: Hair salons, beauty centers, nail studios, tattoo studios, therapists, dietitians, and all appointment-based businesses.

q5.a: The web panel is mobile-friendly. You can manage everything from your phone. A mobile app is on our roadmap.

dashboard.noServiceData: No service appointment data for this period.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.emptyDescription: Drag-and-drop and staff filters will be available here.

plan.title: Subscription plans
plan.subtitle: Your limits and plan comparison.
plan.matrixHint: Cells show whether each plan lists the feature.

onboarding.title: Business setup wizard
onboarding.subtitle: Follow the checklist below to go live.
onboarding.allDoneDesc: Your business is ready to accept bookings.
onboarding.step1: Fill in your business name and contact info.
onboarding.step2Desc: Define at least one service customers can book.
onboarding.step3Desc: Add at least one employee who can take bookings.
onboarding.step4Desc: Activate at least one employee (assign capabilities and work hours).
onboarding.step5Desc: Set your unique booking URL slug in settings.

employees.lead: Define team members who can take bookings.
employees.emptyDesc: Customers can choose a staff member when booking. Add at least one.
employees.name: Full name
employees.servicesHint: Select services this employee can provide and set skill level.
employees.needCapability: Add at least one service capability before continuing.
employees.scheduleHint: Leave as default to use business hours. Save each day you change.
employees.offboardNone: No future appointments. You can deactivate instead.

leave.dateRequired: Start and end date are required
